21323.title: George Clarke's Old House, New Home : Newquay
21323.description: In this art deco special, George takes on a challenging period property in Newquay, Cornwall. When Gareth and Frances Jenkins bought an ugly-looking pebble-dashed bungalow, they had little idea of the house's astonishing history.
21323.category: Reality, Home & Garden, Bouwen en verbouwen
